news.title:
IRDAI issued a show cause notice to Religare's subsidiary Care Health citing regulatory violations.
Care Health is preparing remedial steps; no material financial impact reported yet.
news.summary:
IRDAI issued a show cause notice to Religare's subsidiary Care Health citing regulatory violations.
Care Health is preparing remedial steps; no material financial impact reported yet.

news.title:
Religare Enterprises and Religare Finvest approved a demerger of insurance, financial services.
The demerger aims to create two separate listed entities from the businesses.
news.summary:
Religare Enterprises and Religare Finvest approved a demerger of insurance, financial services.
The demerger aims to create two separate listed entities from the businesses.

news.title:
Nifty fights to maintain 25,000 after shedding 200 points, nearing 26,000 last week.
IT sector drags Nifty; focus on Manappuram, Religare, EaseMyTrip, Fortis, GMR Airport.
news.summary:
Nifty fights to maintain 25,000 after shedding 200 points, nearing 26,000 last week.
IT sector drags Nifty; focus on Manappuram, Religare, EaseMyTrip, Fortis, GMR Airport.

news.title:
Religare board approves demerger into Religare Ent & Religare Finvest, issuing shares on 1:1 basis.
Post demerger, RFL will handle lending, broking, investments; REL retains Care Health stake. Shares down 3.3% at ₹244.
news.summary:
Religare board approves demerger into Religare Ent & Religare Finvest, issuing shares on 1:1 basis.
Post demerger, RFL will handle lending, broking, investments; REL retains Care Health stake. Shares down 3.3% at ₹244.

news.title:
Religare's board approved financial services demerger from insurance business.
Shareholders to receive 1 equity share in new entity per existing share.
news.summary:
Religare's board approved financial services demerger from insurance business.
Shareholders to receive 1 equity share in new entity per existing share.

news.title:
Religare Enterprises' Q3 net loss widened to 453M INR from 430.8M INR YoY.
Q3 revenue rose significantly to 20.56B INR from 16.69B INR YoY.
news.summary:
Religare Enterprises' Q3 net loss widened to 453M INR from 430.8M INR YoY.
Q3 revenue rose significantly to 20.56B INR from 16.69B INR YoY.

news.title:
Religare Enterprises Ltd schedules earnings call on 16th Feb 2026 to discuss Q3 and 9M FY26 performance.
Earnings call details include 4:00 PM IST timing and access numbers for global participants.
news.summary:
Religare Enterprises Ltd schedules earnings call on 16th Feb 2026 to discuss Q3 and 9M FY26 performance.
Earnings call details include 4:00 PM IST timing and access numbers for global participants.

news.title:
Religare Enterprises surged 7.3% on 3 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 252.85 intraday.
The NBFC outperformed its sector and broader market, showcasing strong momentum.
news.summary:
Religare Enterprises surged 7.3% on 3 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 252.85 intraday.
The NBFC outperformed its sector and broader market, showcasing strong momentum.

news.title:
Religare Enterprises' subsidiary Care Health Insurance upgraded to IND AA with stable outlook.
Upgrade by India Ratings on Jan 29, 2026, reflects improved creditworthiness and stability.
news.summary:
Religare Enterprises' subsidiary Care Health Insurance upgraded to IND AA with stable outlook.
Upgrade by India Ratings on Jan 29, 2026, reflects improved creditworthiness and stability.

news.title:
Care Health Insurance, subsidiary of Religare, fined Rs. 1 crore by IRDAI for 2021 violations.
Violations include policyholder protection and corporate governance; may impact Religare's financials.
news.summary:
Care Health Insurance, subsidiary of Religare, fined Rs. 1 crore by IRDAI for 2021 violations.
Violations include policyholder protection and corporate governance; may impact Religare's financials.

news.title:
NCLAT dismissed SEBI's plea to recover penalties from Annies Apparel in a Religare Finvest case.
The tribunal ruled claims cannot be filed after liquidation begins under IBC.
news.summary:
NCLAT dismissed SEBI's plea to recover penalties from Annies Apparel in a Religare Finvest case.
The tribunal ruled claims cannot be filed after liquidation begins under IBC.

news.title:
Religare Enterprises issues 19,85,816 equity shares at ₹10 FV + ₹225 premium, raising ₹35 cr.
Equity share capital of Religare Enterprises grows to ₹332.7 cr after the issuance.
news.summary:
Religare Enterprises issues 19,85,816 equity shares at ₹10 FV + ₹225 premium, raising ₹35 cr.
Equity share capital of Religare Enterprises grows to ₹332.7 cr after the issuance.

news.title:
Religare aims for 'industry plus' growth in broking business soon.
Focus remains on improving operations before IPO or demerger plans.
news.summary:
Religare aims for 'industry plus' growth in broking business soon.
Focus remains on improving operations before IPO or demerger plans.

news.title:
Religare Enterprises confirms no price hikes for Care Health Insurance this quarter.
Housing Finance business targets exponential growth in 2 years leveraging strong balance sheet.
news.summary:
Religare Enterprises confirms no price hikes for Care Health Insurance this quarter.
Housing Finance business targets exponential growth in 2 years leveraging strong balance sheet.

news.title:
Religare Enterprises Q2 net profit drops to 388M INR vs 513M YoY.
Revenue rises to 20.6B INR vs 19.5B YoY, showing growth trend.
news.summary:
Religare Enterprises Q2 net profit drops to 388M INR vs 513M YoY.
Revenue rises to 20.6B INR vs 19.5B YoY, showing growth trend.

news.title:
Religare Enterprises will hold a board meeting on Nov 13, 2025, to approve Q2 FY26 financial results.
Trading window closed since Oct 1, 2025, and will reopen after Nov 15, 2025 results declaration.
news.summary:
Religare Enterprises will hold a board meeting on Nov 13, 2025, to approve Q2 FY26 financial results.
Trading window closed since Oct 1, 2025, and will reopen after Nov 15, 2025 results declaration.

news.title:
Sebi faces delays in nearly two dozen high-profile cases, including Gensol, Religare, and Jane Street, due to board vacancies.
Pending cases, including Adani investigations, strain remaining members as government works to fill vacancies; interim measures suggested.
news.summary:
Sebi faces delays in nearly two dozen high-profile cases, including Gensol, Religare, and Jane Street, due to board vacancies.
Pending cases, including Adani investigations, strain remaining members as government works to fill vacancies; interim measures suggested.

news.title:
Religare plans Care Health Insurance IPO, valuing it at Rs 16,000-17,500 crore.
Religare holds 62.8% stake; revamping leadership as shares trade at Rs 259.9, down 1.8% Monday.
news.summary:
Religare plans Care Health Insurance IPO, valuing it at Rs 16,000-17,500 crore.
Religare holds 62.8% stake; revamping leadership as shares trade at Rs 259.9, down 1.8% Monday.
